svg.title: Earth Systems Ontology
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the ontology of Earth's systems including classes, subclasses, properties, and relations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Earth as the root class in this ontology')
sendPrompt('What are the subclasses of Atmosphere?')
sendPrompt('What are the subclasses of Lithosphere?')
sendPrompt('What are the subclasses of Hydrosphere?')
sendPrompt('How does the Biosphere interact with the other spheres?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Stratosphere and ozone')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Thermosphere and auroras')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the inner and outer Core')
sendPrompt('Explain the isPartOf relation in this ontology')
sendPrompt('Explain the isLocatedIn relation in this ontology')
sendPrompt('How does the Biosphere interact with each sphere via interactsWith?')

svg.text: Click any node to learn more
